title: Let's Enjoy Math!
description: Let's experience the magic of numbers together!

scenes.speech: Does math look hard? It can actually be fun!
scenes.title: The Magic of Math!

scenes.speech: Addition means putting things together. What happens with 3 apples and 2 apples?
scenes.title: Addition = Put Together
scenes.content: 3 + 2 = 5. When you combine 3 and 2, you get 5!

scenes.speech: You learned the basics of math. Practice will make you even better!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
